name: TriCollagen
description: TriCollagen is a new generation collagen supplement combining Collagen Tripeptides (CTP), OPITAC™ torula yeast glutathione, and Omegia® Tibetan Sea Buckthorn with Omega 3, 6, 7, 9. It is designed to support smooth skin, thick hair, strong nails and overall anti-aging.
benefits: Highly bioavailable & digestible - absorbs within 30 minutes
More effective than conventional hydrolyzed collagen peptides
Supports smooth skin, thick hair, strong nails
Glutathione improves collagen absorption and has whitening effect
Omega 7 in Tibetan Sea Buckthorn improves skin hydration and elasticity
Strengthens bones by promoting bone calcification

dosage.therapeutic: 1 sachet daily mixed in 125ml water or juice (below 50°C) before bedtime
dosage.general: Mix 1 sachet in 125ml (1/2 cup) water or juice and drink before bedtime

ingredients: Omegia® whole sea buckthorn fruit powder
who_can_consume: Women seeking beauty from within, anti-aging support, skin/hair/nail health.
who_cannot_consume: Contains torula yeast extract. Consult a healthcare professional if you have yeast allergies.

qa.question: Why is Collagen Tripeptide better than regular collagen?
qa.answer: Collagen Tripeptide (CTP) has an average molecular weight of 500Da and contains GPH which absorbs within 30 minutes. It is more effective than conventional hydrolyzed collagen peptides and is incorporated into connective tissue preferentially.

qa.question: What are the benefits of glutathione in TriCollagen?
qa.answer: OPITAC™ Glutathione is clinically proven to make skin brighter and lighter. It inhibits tyrosinase activity, suppresses eumelanin development, provides UV damage protection, and accelerates production of type I collagen.
